question:
I'm new to this codebase and need a real code-based tour before my first behavior change.

Find the central runtime flow, trace it from the public API to the code that does the work, and show the nearby code paths and tests I should read next.

shellCommands: "C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe" -Command 'rg -n "should resolve editor:mount/editor:initialize|should replay editor:mount/editor:initialize|should call onMount before onInitialize props|should trigger onChange on render|should trigger onPointerDown/onPointerUp" packages/excalidraw/tests/packages/events.test.tsx'

"C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe" -Command "rg -n \"drag&drop file doesn't reset non-persisted appState|changing fontSize with text tool selected\" packages/excalidraw/tests/appState.test.tsx"

"C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe" -Command 'rg -n "should not modify anything on unrelated appstate change|should not end up with history entry when there are no elements changes|should not collapse when applying corrupted history entry|should not clear the redo stack on standalone appstate change" packages/excalidraw/tests/history.test.tsx'

"C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe" -Command "rg -n \"export const Excalidraw = React\\.memo|const ExcalidrawBase|export const ExcalidrawAPIProvider|InitializeApp\" packages/excalidraw/index.tsx"

"C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe" -Command "rg -n \"constructor\\(props: AppProps\\)|private initializeScene|public syncActionResult|public updateScene|public render\\(|public async componentDidMount|componentDidUpdate\\(|private createExcalidrawAPI|private triggerRender|setAppState:\" packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx"
graph.answer:
**Runtime Flow**
- The public package entry is [packages/excalidraw/index.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/index.tsx:67). `ExcalidrawBase` normalizes props, sets defaults for `UIOptions` and image options, then mounts `EditorJotaiProvider -> InitializeApp -> App`.
- The same file exports [ExcalidrawAPIProvider](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/index.tsx:52) for out-of-tree API access, and memoizes the component as [Excalidraw](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/index.tsx:310). The read-side hook alias is exported at [useOnExcalidrawStateChange](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/index.tsx:455).
- `InitializeApp` is small but important: [packages/excalidraw/components/InitializeApp.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/components/InitializeApp.tsx:17) waits for language loading, then lets the editor render.

- The real runtime engine is [packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx:837). The constructor allocates the core objects: `scene`, `renderer`, `history`, `store`, `fonts`, and `actionManager`, and it builds the imperative API in [createExcalidrawAPI](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx:792).
- `componentDidMount` at [App.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx:3183) wires the scene update listener, DOM listeners, resize observer, and then calls `initializeScene` at [App.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx:2950) to restore `initialData`/`initialState`, merge library items, and push the restored scene through `syncActionResult`.
- `syncActionResult` at [App.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx:2825) is the bridge from actions/API calls into scene and React state. `updateScene` at [App.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx:4717] is the main public mutation surface external callers use.
- `componentDidUpdate` at [App.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx:3484) flushes app-state observers, commits the scene to the store, and fires `onChange` once loading is complete.
- `render` at [App.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx:2139) fans out into `Renderer.getRenderableElements()`, then composes the actual draw layers: `StaticCanvas`, `NewElementCanvas`, `InteractiveCanvas`, and overlay UI. The next code hops are [packages/excalidraw/scene/Renderer.ts](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/scene/Renderer.ts:40), [packages/excalidraw/components/canvases/StaticCanvas.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/components/canvases/StaticCanvas.tsx:33), and [packages/excalidraw/components/canvases/InteractiveCanvas.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/components/canvases/InteractiveCanvas.tsx:86).
- `AppStateObserver` at [packages/excalidraw/components/AppStateObserver.ts](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/components/AppStateObserver.ts:62) is the subscription layer behind the public state hooks. The hooks themselves are in [packages/excalidraw/hooks/useAppStateValue.ts](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/hooks/useAppStateValue.ts:70) and [packages/excalidraw/hooks/useAppStateValue.ts](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/hooks/useAppStateValue.ts:128).

**Read Next**
- [packages/excalidraw/data/restore.ts](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/data/restore.ts) for how `initialData` and `appState` are sanitized before entering the scene.
- [packages/excalidraw/scene/Renderer.ts](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/scene/Renderer.ts:208) plus [StaticCanvas](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/components/canvases/StaticCanvas.tsx:33) and [InteractiveCanvas](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/components/canvases/InteractiveCanvas.tsx:86) for the draw pipeline.
- [packages/excalidraw/components/AppStateObserver.ts](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/components/AppStateObserver.ts:137) and [packages/excalidraw/hooks/useAppStateValue.ts](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/hooks/useAppStateValue.ts:128) for state subscriptions without rerendering the whole tree.
- [packages/excalidraw/actions/manager.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/actions/manager.tsx) if your behavior change is driven by keyboard/tool actions.
- [packages/excalidraw/tests/packages/events.test.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/tests/packages/events.test.tsx:30), [C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/tests/packages/events.test.tsx:64], [C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/tests/packages/events.test.tsx:90], [C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/tests/packages/events.test.tsx:111], and [C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/tests/packages/events.test.tsx:135] for mount/initialize callbacks, `onChange`, and pointer events.
- [packages/excalidraw/tests/appState.test.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/tests/appState.test.tsx:17) and [C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/tests/appState.test.tsx:65] for restore and app-state persistence behavior.
- [packages/excalidraw/tests/history.test.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/tests/history.test.tsx:147), [C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/tests/history.test.tsx:224], [C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/tests/history.test.tsx:254], and [C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/tests/history.test.tsx:285] for `updateScene`, undo/redo, and capture semantics.
- [packages/excalidraw/tests/appStateHooks.test.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/tests/appStateHooks.test.tsx:48) and [C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/tests/appStateHooks.test.tsx:75] for the public hook contract.
- [packages/excalidraw/tests/helpers/api.ts](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/tests/helpers/api.ts:69) if you want to see how the tests drive `updateScene` and `setAppState`.

**If you mean the hosted app**
- The browser bootstrap is [excalidraw-app/index.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/excalidraw-app/index.tsx:2), which just creates the React root and renders the app shell.
- The host-specific flow lives in [excalidraw-app/App.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/excalidraw-app/App.tsx:215), [C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/excalidraw-app/App.tsx:413], [C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/excalidraw-app/App.tsx:542], [C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/excalidraw-app/App.tsx:910], and [C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/excalidraw-app/App.tsx:1274]. That layer adds local storage, collaboration, and app-only scene initialization around the same `Excalidraw` component.

If you want, I can turn this into a narrower “first-change map” for either:
1. library/API changes, or
2. hosted app changes.
